# Visor Design System

> Visor is Low Orbit Studio's shared design system. Components are distributed via a shadcn-style registry (copy-and-own). Design tokens are distributed via npm (`@loworbitstudio/visor-core`).

## Quick Start

Install tokens: `npm install @loworbitstudio/visor-core`
Add a component: `npx visor add button`
List all components: `npx visor list --json`
Get component details: `npx visor info <name> --json`

## Documentation

- Full AI context file: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/low-orbit-studio/visor/main/CONSUMER_CLAUDE.md
- Component docs: https://visor.loworbit.studio/docs/components
- CLI reference: https://visor.loworbit.studio/docs/cli

## Optional

- [Component catalog](https://visor.loworbit.studio/docs/components): All components with examples
- [Pattern library](https://visor.loworbit.studio/docs/patterns): Composition patterns for common UIs
- [Token reference](https://visor.loworbit.studio/docs/themes/token-rules): CSS custom property naming
- [Full AI context (llms-full.txt)](https://visor.loworbit.studio/llms-full.txt): Complete catalog, patterns, token prefix table, and CLI reference
